---
title: "test_adjudicator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_adjudicator.py"
loc: 41
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.32
style_score: 3.43
intel_score: 5.30
overall_score: 4.18
---

## Intent
The `test_adjudicator.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_game_files, test_process_queue_success, MockGM, get_outcome. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_game_files, test_process_queue_success, MockGM, get_outcome. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.adjudicator](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.adjudicator)

### Exports
- `mock_game_files`
- `test_process_queue_success`
- `MockGM`
- `get_outcome`
